name: ip-signoff
description: Final local evidence signoff gate for an IP against IP_SIGNOFF.md.

tasks.detail: Read IP_SIGNOFF.md, SSOT YAML, derived verify/ip_contract.json, FL/CL checks, equivalence goals, RTL todo gate, RTL provenance, compile/lint reports, TB Python compile report, simulation evidence, scoreboard events, coverage summary, optional mutation guard report, and waiver ledger.
tasks.criteria: All required artifacts are either present or reported as explicit blockers in signoff/ip_signoff.json.

tasks.detail: Run python3 workflow/signoff/scripts/check_ip_signoff.py <ip> --root <ip-parent>. Do not claim signoff from prose or stale stage status.
tasks.criteria: check_ip_signoff.py exits 0, writes signoff/ip_signoff.json, writes signoff/ip_signoff.md, and reports status=pass.

tasks.detail: If the gate reports status=blocked or unapproved production waivers, prepare a concise human review request. Do not edit locked truth to force pass.
tasks.criteria: Human-owned blockers are listed with artifact path, reason, and required decision.
